<!-- generated by setup-repository-workflow -->
# Domain docs

Start with root `AGENTS.md`. Read `docs/CONTEXT.md` only when the slice needs
the current authority map, then load only the domain files and ADRs relevant to
the task.

If a file does not exist, proceed silently. Create or change domain documentation only when an active terminology conflict or durable architecture decision earns it.

Use the repository's defined vocabulary in issues, code, tests, and review. Surface an ADR conflict explicitly instead of silently overriding it. Domain docs own shared language and durable decisions; they do not own current status, task queues, or implementation detail.
